title: D&Z 6 Pack Gold Plastic Tablecloth Table Cloth 84" Round Disposable Table Covers for Party Birthday Wedding Christmas
features: PACKAGE & SIZE - 6 packs gold plastic tablecloths available for 84 inch round tablecloth. If the size of the table is different, you can fold or cut the table cloth.
DISPOSABLE - You don't have to worry about garbage and oil. After the event or dinner, just roll up the black disposable tablecloth and dispose of it, which is very convenient.

Suitable for all kinds of activities and colors: dining table, party, wedding, BBQ, outdoor activities, Christmas, Halloween, family outings. And also the tablecloth has many beautiful colors to choose from, including white, black, red, navy, gold, pink
International products have separate terms, are sold from abroad and may differ from local products, including fit, age rating and language of product, labeling or instructions.
description: Product Description Product Details: SIZE & PACKAGE: 12 packs of 84 inch round plastic tablecloths. Material: PEVA material. It is odorless and non-toxic. DISPOSABLE: Just roll it up and dispose of after the party or event. MULTIPLE USES: Unlike your typical round paper tablecloths, these round plastic tablecloths will cover any table up to 7 feet. It is ideal for dining table, party, wedding, BBQ, outdoor activities, Christmas, Halloween, family outings. Available Colors: White Black Red Pink Yellow Gold Dark Blue Safety Warning Avoid use near heat sources.
